enonce.texte:
Read the sentences below. Choose the correct computer vocabulary word to complete each sentence.

1. Please _______ the computer before you leave.

2. _______ the file to save your work.

3. _______ your name in the text box.

4. _______ the mouse to select the file.

5. _______ the printer to print your document.

questions.texte: Complete each sentence with the correct computer vocabulary.
questions.reponse:
1. turn off
2. Save
3. Type
4. Click
5. Turn on

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 1 with the action to stop the computer.
sousQuestions.reponse: Please turn off the computer before you leave.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 2 with the action to keep your work.
sousQuestions.reponse: Save the file to save your work.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 3 with the action to put text on the screen.
sousQuestions.reponse: Type your name in the text box.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 4 with the action to select something with the mouse.
sousQuestions.reponse: Click the mouse to select the file.

sousQuestions.texte: Complete sentence 5 with the action to start the printer.
sousQuestions.reponse: Turn on the printer to print your document.

enonce.texte:
Read the instructions below. Put the steps in the correct order to turn on a computer and open a file.

A. Type your name in the text box.

B. Wait for the computer to start.

C. Press the power button on the computer.

D. Open the file you want to work on.

E. Save your work.

questions.texte: Put the steps in the correct order.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the first step to turn on a computer?
sousQuestions.reponse: Press the power button on the computer.

sousQuestions.texte: What do you do after pressing the power button?
sousQuestions.reponse: Wait for the computer to start.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the next step after the computer starts?
sousQuestions.reponse: Open the file you want to work on.

sousQuestions.texte: What do you do after opening the file?
sousQuestions.reponse: Type your name in the text box.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the final step?
sousQuestions.reponse: Save your work.

enonce.texte:
Match the following computer commands with their meanings:

  • 1. Turn on
  • 2. Turn off
  • 3. Click
  • 4. Type
  • 5. Save
  • 6. Print

questions.texte: Match each command with its correct meaning.
questions.reponse:
1. Start the computer
2. Stop the computer
3. Press the mouse button
4. Write text using the keyboard
5. Keep your document
6. Make a copy on paper

sousQuestions.texte: What does 'Turn on' mean?
sousQuestions.reponse: To start the computer.

sousQuestions.texte: What does 'Turn off' mean?
sousQuestions.reponse: To stop the computer.

sousQuestions.texte: What does 'Click' mean?
sousQuestions.reponse: To press the mouse button.

sousQuestions.texte: What does 'Type' mean?
sousQuestions.reponse: To write text using the keyboard.

sousQuestions.texte: What does 'Save' mean?
sousQuestions.reponse: To keep your document.

sousQuestions.texte: What does 'Print' mean?
sousQuestions.reponse: To make a copy on paper.

intitule: Following Instructions to Complete a Task

enonce.texte:
You are in the computer lab. Your teacher gives you these instructions. Read them and answer the questions.

Instructions:

  • Turn on the computer.
  • Open the file named 'My Work'.
  • Type your full name at the top of the document.
  • Write two sentences about your favourite subject at school.
  • Save the file with your name.
  • Print the document.
  • Turn off the computer.

questions.texte: Answer the following questions about the instructions.
questions.reponse:
1. Turn on the computer.
2. Open the file named 'My Work'.
3. Type your full name at the top of the document.
4. Write two sentences about your favourite subject at school.
5. Save the file with your name.
6. Print the document.
7. Turn off the computer.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the first thing you must do?
sousQuestions.reponse: Turn on the computer.

sousQuestions.texte: What file should you open?
sousQuestions.reponse: The file named 'My Work'.

sousQuestions.texte: What should you type at the top of the document?
sousQuestions.reponse: Your full name.

sousQuestions.texte: How many sentences about your favourite subject should you write?
sousQuestions.reponse: Two sentences.

sousQuestions.texte: What should you do with the file after writing?
sousQuestions.reponse: Save the file with your name.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the last instruction you must follow?
sousQuestions.reponse: Turn off the computer.

enonce.texte:
Your friend doesn't know how to use a computer. Write a short paragraph with clear instructions to help your friend complete these tasks:

  • Turn on the computer
  • Open a file
  • Type a short message
  • Save the file
  • Turn off the computer

Use sequence markers: First, Then, Next, After that, Finally.

questions.texte: Write clear instructions for your friend.
questions.reponse: A well-written paragraph with at least 5 steps using sequence markers.

sousQuestions.texte: Use 'First' for the first instruction.
sousQuestions.reponse: First, press the power button to turn on the computer.

sousQuestions.texte: Use 'Then' or 'Next' for the second and third instructions.
sousQuestions.reponse: Then, open the file you want to work on. Next, type your message using the keyboard.

sousQuestions.texte: Use 'After that' for the next step.
sousQuestions.reponse: After that, click on 'Save' to keep your work.

sousQuestions.texte: Use 'Finally' for the last step.
sousQuestions.reponse: Finally, turn off the computer properly.

enonce.texte:
Read the following text about using a computer and answer the questions.

When you use a computer, it is important to follow instructions carefully. First, turn on the computer by pressing the power button. Wait for the screen to show the desktop. Then, use the mouse to click on the file you want to open. You can type your text using the keyboard. After you finish, click on 'Save' to keep your document. If you want to print, click on 'Print' and wait for the paper to come out. Finally, always turn off the computer when you finish.

questions.reponse:
1. Press the power button.
2. You should wait for the screen to show the desktop.
3. Use the mouse to click on the file.
4. You can type your text using the keyboard.
5. Click on 'Save' to keep the document.
6. Click on 'Print' to print a document.
7. Turn off the computer.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the first step to turn on the computer?
sousQuestions.reponse: Press the power button.

sousQuestions.texte: What should you do after turning on the computer?
sousQuestions.reponse: Wait for the screen to show the desktop.

sousQuestions.texte: How do you open a file?
sousQuestions.reponse: Use the mouse to click on the file you want to open.

sousQuestions.texte: What do you use to type text?
sousQuestions.reponse: The keyboard.

sousQuestions.texte: How do you save your work?
sousQuestions.reponse: Click on 'Save'.

sousQuestions.texte: What should you do to get a paper copy of your document?
sousQuestions.reponse: Click on 'Print' and wait for the paper to come out.

sousQuestions.texte: What is the final instruction you must follow?
sousQuestions.reponse: Always turn off the computer when you finish.

intitule: Creating Computer Instructions for a Friend

enonce.texte:
Imagine you are teaching a friend who has never used a computer before. Write a detailed step-by-step instruction guide on how to:

  • Turn on the computer
  • Open a text document
  • Write a short paragraph about your family
  • Save the document
  • Print the document
  • Turn off the computer

Your guide should be clear and easy to follow. Use sequence markers and explain each step.

questions.texte: Write a complete instruction guide for your friend.
questions.reponse: A well-organized guide with all steps clearly explained, using sequence markers and imperative sentences.

sousQuestions.texte: Start with an introduction explaining what the guide is about.
sousQuestions.reponse: This guide will help you use a computer for the first time. Follow each step carefully.

sousQuestions.texte: Explain step 1: Turn on the computer.
sousQuestions.reponse: First, find the power button on the computer. Press it once. Wait for the screen to light up and show the desktop.

sousQuestions.texte: Explain step 2: Open a text document.
sousQuestions.reponse: Next, look for a program like Notepad or Word. Click on it to open a new document.

sousQuestions.texte: Explain step 3: Write a paragraph about your family.
sousQuestions.reponse: Then, use the keyboard to type a short paragraph about your family. For example: 'My family has four people: my father, my mother, my brother, and me.'

sousQuestions.texte: Explain step 4: Save the document.
sousQuestions.reponse: After that, click on 'File' and then 'Save'. Choose a name for your document and click 'Save' again.

sousQuestions.texte: Explain step 5: Print the document.
sousQuestions.reponse: Next, click on 'File' and then 'Print'. Make sure the printer is connected. Click 'Print' and wait for the paper.

sousQuestions.texte: Explain step 6: Turn off the computer.
sousQuestions.reponse: Finally, click on 'Start' and choose 'Shut down'. Wait for the computer to turn off completely.

sousQuestions.texte: End with a conclusion reminding your friend to ask questions if they need help.
sousQuestions.reponse: Remember, if you have any questions or problems, just ask me. I am here to help you.
